textByHash.00dfca1b76e243f72f5f1853c51751915b0ae10b: Rather than resorting to needless anger, had you considered just asking first?
textByHash.0bbee9eb13e9c7e2cf523b869e3d2e01c3579363: Time is wasting. You should get this cell open.
textByHash.0f993cb9aa042bef4c5725927e0793b8d9c2a14d: I've checked every corner of this prison now. This room was the last place to look. There is only one possibility: The Frostenhorn isn't here.
textByHash.1156a8d8c5c36cb4690081656521764d0ae90e23: Once he's there, don't try to be a hero. Just keep him busy until I'm ready.
textByHash.1aaec7c9c0138c03d6bd1767c18628ec09fd1c8a: Because it made it believable. Now, are we done?
textByHash.1f09bc78e35040bd0f1f99b235bc30b26312c6eb: I can give you two. First, because you'll fail. You have no weapons or armour, and even if you did, it wouldn't go well. Second, because without me you'd still be in that cell.
textByHash.24ff228c8519d638a5dbe0e85f18ff8b06f67563: It seems you are yet to consider an obvious question. Are you not wondering how I ended up in that cell?
textByHash.27cda643c0ffe1ca7ccb3d42b1ebe9d7c5ce1e2e: Kandur Hosidius. You have been marked for death.
textByHash.29d4a1ceff3bad5e946fd15309fed500a9c333c6: Yes. Now, let's be on our way.
textByHash.3027b6aa322d22d82ab9f619225e8bd31c99606c: I will not be giving you a choice in the matter. Perhaps justice will be served someday, but not today. Goodbye.
textByHash.4dc77175456bde1aee9b5bec63dda30e48efb68a: It was that Mahjarrat. Seems he doesn't think much of you either, as he was also responsible for your own imprisonment.
textByHash.52e22bb6390c04f014edc0ce7dbfc8c936933fd9: Yes. You can get there by heading north. I've already unlocked the gate.
textByHash.5696f7480e85a519aa78a68437eac2e635523a9a: Besides, beyond placating your curiosity, the answers I gave are rather meaningless. They do not jeopardise me or my employer in any way.
textByHash.5d5ca93a067e89559d9b22c46ba16c8fce302958: Because I do, and you'd be wise to listen to it. I came here in search of something, and the asylum is one of the last places I need to look.
textByHash.613f5a6024d03aea146ec0907eca4f4c5aaf207c: They're in a chest in the cell opposite this one, but the cell is locked. My sword is in there as well.
textByHash.63f49fc889562cdb97c7c8fb8fd9eeb176070cd8: I told you, I'm looking for something.
textByHash.7cf08a17a8b593c3f17da0bd65d45463529d0b9b: A magical artefact called the Frostenhorn.
textByHash.7dd016b1c4bcf926e2b382bde1434dba38c8afba: Because it would have made it believable. Unfortunately, I failed to account for you having already done so. Now, are we done?
textByHash.80fc9c1e4298701ead197511cf16d3af8a558c4e: Martin Holt. You have been marked for death.
textByHash.865c32493fcee4abc8ed836e02eb9959f4f423bf: Now, once again, let's get this cell open.
textByHash.866d6eaef2a1c374eaf294b373b38ea0a4a8ed08: I kill when it is the best way to further my goal. That would not have been the case here, so I chose the cleaner and more efficient option.
textByHash.8838ee95aafdeded7395f9c8fa24f046587d0515: It should, but it would be unwise to wait and find out. I must resume my search for the Frostenhorn and you have your Duke business to deal with.
textByHash.88e3c209a3c10a3b1ad71edcde94939918d6a4d8: The old refugee camp seems like a good place to spring our trap. I left a pack there with some firecrackers in. The noise should quickly attract his attention.
textByHash.89639783a8e0332776cec5ddfd2c01fc18937822: No, but you don't have any other options. Now, I suggest you focus on finding the key to that cell so we can recover our equipment. While you do that, I'll work out how to reach the asylum.
textByHash.8ce90736cf4cca1e71cef3d76657dcc685bc3a47: You provided an opportunity and I took it. Your awareness of said opportunity was irrelevant.
textByHash.93b962c2c074e0352ef87726da3e43a9f5c7ff6f: Don't you remember how we escaped Ghorrock Prison?
textByHash.9cb1bb328f3ecb51d6eaf9c053ad51d2294fdcf9: Correct. Now, while I appreciate you came here to kill me, we are both in each other's debt, so let's set aside the threats and start focusing on more important matters.
textByHash.9fcb623245d028737a939ad66f7993c46ca1df92: Our best option will be to trap him. I suggest we do so by repeating what we did before.
textByHash.a15c42eb7013910e7aec91f78cd68c479ced618a: Jorra Ashtar. You have been marked for death.
textByHash.b6e6137a9b7288cf6c5f2b8aabd1cc83fff8e671: I don't know, but he'll be nearby, and we are currently poorly equipped to deal with him. I'm missing my sword and you don't have any weapons either.
textByHash.c1613fd2494dfd68a63f07a6e45e5749fdd65352: With Jhallan around, neither of us stand a good chance of getting what we want. However, if we work together, we can deal with him and get to the asylum.
textByHash.c1d1c656a8ccbde27fb09b380202491fe9c90841: Oh, and you should take this. You might need it.
textByHash.c4af00cda92dd34c0ee8e9dc69fd9a69dfd0dafc: You weren't going to open the gate until I provided satisfactory answers, so I provided them.
textByHash.c7b428fd37e59c37ef3a2b04876b97008df85282: I don't know much about the Mahjarrat, but it's clear they're not easy to kill. Jhallan is thankfully fairly weak for their kind, but that still makes him significantly stronger than us.
textByHash.c8f848ff7cab3a7fe3ba19ff63c360361d18adfc: We'll reconvene once you have the cell open.
textByHash.d08b06f3f97cb87b535f4c49e71dc0f4a2268e84: I needed to recover that crest half from the Carnillean Mansion. Framing the Hazeel Cult was the best cover.
textByHash.d5269c68fe7c4285a8c738d60906bae9534327f4: Good. Let's get this cell open.
textByHash.dd9c3c3d9e8879d3061bc9220185e907bae9923b: I don't know and I don't need to know. I've been paid to recover it from this place and that's all that matters to me.
textByHash.e27603bbbb020d3e12183b1d6d4a7fca517f200f: I suspect your search will be quite a short one as things currently stand.
textByHash.e95def95e1d44cb6f9bfb49fd4d2d95364f4cf8f: Right, you'll be pleased to know that I've obtained a key that can open the way to the asylum. However, Jhallan must be dealt with before we can use it safely.
textByHash.e9aa50bfe69285f47586f9e8cb836434431129a8: He was, but now he's not. There was an unfortunate mishap.
textByHash.f19b1022e691b21cae74e1064f11fdc4d32435bc: I did all that was required of me. If they are able to discover the true location of the horn, they are welcome to hire me once more. Until then, my work is done.
textByHash.fb7a800bedb7d2e65c5a702129b459c0a71e9d83: Yes. You distract him and I take him unaware.
textByHash.ff3759977efcfeeaf53389ffcb989340f3e9a152: A good question, but one that is not my concern. My employer believed it to be here, but was clearly mistaken. That's their problem.
